title: Smoky Japanese Chicken Salad
description: A refreshing salad with smoky chicken, crispy Japanese tempura bits, crumbled feta cheese, and a bed of fresh greens.

ingredients.name: Smoky dressing (see notes)
ingredients.notes: Made with 2 tablespoons soy sauce, 2 tablespoons rice vinegar, and 1 teaspoon sesame oil

instructions: 2. In a bowl, toss chicken with 2 tablespoons of smoky dressing and a pinch of salt. Spread on a baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes or until cooked through.
3. Meanwhile, toast Japanese tempura bits in a dry skillet over medium heat for 2-3 minutes or until crispy.
4. In a large bowl, combine mixed greens, crumbled feta cheese, and sliced salad.
5. Slice cooked chicken into bite-sized pieces and add to the bowl with the salad mixture.
6. Sprinkle toasted Japanese tempura bits on top.
7. Drizzle remaining 2 tablespoons of smoky dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
